sentence: Subjective:
HPI: Ms. Ross presents with symptoms of discomfort, a change in discharge, and odor in her vaginal region, particularly on the right side, which has become painful.
She denies any fevers or chills.
She reports that her partner has been having sexual encounters with other people, and she wants to be evaluated for all STDs.
She mentions that she recently learned of her partner's infidelity and is worried about contracting an STD.

She reports that she has been experiencing abnormal discharge, which smells differently and has a different consistency than usual, and that it has been accompanied by right-sided vaginal pain that has not resolved.
Past medical history: She had an irregular Pap smear at age 20, which was not followed up with further testing until her last Pap smear six months ago, which came back normal.
Review of systems: None mentioned.
Current medications: [NOT MENTIONED]
Objective:
Vital signs: [NOT MENTIONED]
Physical exam: The pelvic exam demonstrates no external lesions, normal labia majora and labia minora, normal physiological discharge with normal color and smell.
The cervix is normal, the vaginal wall is normal, no cervical motion tenderness, and no adnexal tenderness or masses were noted.
Test Results: [NOT MENTIONED]
Assessment / Problem List:
Assessment: The patient is at risk for STDs due to her partner's history of infidelity and her own history of an abnormal Pap smear.
Problem list:
STD risk; Abnormal Pap smear past; Partner with multiple sexual partners; Vaginal discharge; Vaginal pain; Recent partner infidelity.
Plan:
I discussed the plan with the patient, which includes STD testing for gonorrhea, chlamydia, trichomoniasis, and blood tests for syphilis, HIV, and hepatitis C.
I informed her that some of these tests may take longer than others and that we will contact her if any abnormalities are found.
I also added that she is at high risk due to her past abnormal Pap smear and her partner's history of infidelity.
Follow-up: I will see her again at her next annual check-up if all results are normal.
